name: CALIFORNIA FIRST LEASING CORP
summary: California First National Bancorp is a bank holding company headquartered in Orange County, California, operating through CalFirst Bank and CalFirst Leasing. The company provides secured financing through equipment leasing, syndicated commercial loans, non-recourse loans secured by leases and equipment, and direct commercial loans. CalFirst Bank gathers deposits via the Internet and operates from one central location, focusing on capital assets including high-tech systems, medical equipment, manufacturing equipment, and transportation assets.
